title: July 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 19''' is the 200th day (201st in leap years) of the year, with 165 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Mark Capri]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Tudi Roche]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Luke McDonnell]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Courtenay Taylor]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 24|''Star Wars Weekly'' 24]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 76|''Star Wars'' (1977) 76]] published.
*[[1988]] – [[Cherami Leigh]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[Droids (1994) 4|''Droids'' (1994) 4]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War 2|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 2]] published.
*2000 – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan (TPB)|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'']] collected in trade paperback.
*[[2006]] – [[Rebellion 4|''Rebellion'' 4]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Beau Gadsdon]] is born.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Imperial Commando 2]]'' is cancelled.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Choices of One]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Maul (2017) 5|''Darth Maul'' (2017) 5]] published.
*2017 – [[Poe Dameron 17|''Poe Dameron'' 17]] published.
*[[2018]] – "[[The Clone Wars: Season Seven|The Return]]" trailer for ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' is released on YouTube.
*[[2023]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 34|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 34]] published.
*2023 – [[Return of the Jedi – The Rebellion 1|''Return of the Jedi – The Rebellion'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[Nubs and RJ Dance]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
